programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E33 Little Big Man

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 I'm Not Jane Doe

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E13 Watch My Hair

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 Pizza Problems
programme.desc: A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody. A dad gets busted for DUI while on his way to pick up a pizza for his kids. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E41 Wigging Out

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Tuxedo Man
programme.desc: Officers have difficulty booking an incomprehensible man. A commotion at a church ends in arrest. A man wearing a tuxedo is detained after mocking officers for wearing “pig suits.”

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: Deputies corral a suspect into a cell after serious turmoil. A man becomes suicidal after being brought in on burglary charges. Facing the gavel, a prisoner berates a Judge during court proceedings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Over Cooked
programme.desc: A man arrested on drug warrants is upset about the BBQ brisket he left on the grill. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E15 Chair Houdini
programme.desc: An intoxicated inmate escapes his restraints. A young woman denies she abused her mother, and a guard removes an inmate who is causing a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Coming Clean
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an honest offender turns himself in. Officers arrest an underage woman who admits to driving under the influence. A woman is taken into custody after harming herself with a pair of scissors

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E35 Army Brat
programme.desc: Guards uncover grooming aids stashed in an unlikely spot while combing through a woman's things. An incarcerated tourist threatens to bring in Johnny Cochran for his defense, and a drunk driver awakens to find X-rated artwork drawn on his body.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E20 Stairway to Jail
programme.desc: After falling down a flight of stairs while drunk, a young man is amazed he is in jail for refusing to go to the hospital. An expectant father is arrested after a gin-fueled rampage at his parent's house and misses the birth of his first child. A woman arrested for selling fake designer purses as real ones says she didn’t know it was a crime.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E39 Occupied By Psoriasis

programme.desc: A motorcyclist refuses to stop for the police and later tries to escape on foot. A pedestrian is found to have a large soda cup full of anything but soda. A man calls for police help when he’s verbally attacked on a city bus.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E02 Sittin’ in the Dark
programme.desc: Cops nab a suspect who tries to escape by hiding in plain sight. A man fires away when he believes his dog is in danger. Paramedics are called for a distraught woman and her catatonic partner.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E28 Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers give a driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E10 Burrowing the Evidence
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect reported having been involved in a car jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag with illegal prescription drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E32 Riding Dirty
programme.desc: An investigation involving two suspicious men in parked cars results in a foot chase and drug bust. An officer responds to a domestic call involving a threatening exhusband who is taken into custody. Officers in Florida question a deceptive and drug using couple.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E01 Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E13 My Jewelry’s Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist gets booked for trying to split when officers pull him over for a traffic violation. Two brothers struggle to explain why they took off in their truck when they saw the cops. A man takes a swing at his sister because she refuses to mow the lawn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E07 No Money, More Problems
programme.desc: A woman hides in her apartment after she skips out on paying her cab fare. A knife fight results in multiple calls to the police for help. A French tourist get a bus ride from Hell in Florida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E14 Not Gonna Stop
programme.desc: Despite driving a large SUV and trailer, a suspect tries to outrun the police. A driver tries to hide contraband on his person. Police are called into a domestic dispute involving a husband and wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E36 Last Call Brawl
programme.desc: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E02 Dine and Flee
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E25 Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man jumps from a moving vehicle in an effort to escape the police. A car chase ends with a call to paramedics. An agitated man confuses threatening actions with heroism.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E14 Release & Catch
programme.desc: An officer pulls over an erratic driver while on the way to a shots fired call. An officer attempts to stop a resistant motorcyclist. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving an intoxicated man and a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E12 The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car. A driver comes clean to a deputy during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E02 First Time Caller
programme.desc: A desperate suspect risks his life in an attempt to escape arrest. A father refuses to lie for his violent son. A malnourished woman makes a call to report some trespassing ghosts.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E19 Memory Loss
programme.desc: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E15 All The World's Our Bedroom
programme.desc: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E09 Poor Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: A suspect in a traffic stop decides to handle the situation by screaming at the police. Officers have a close encounter with a suspect who admits that he has hidden contraband. A man’s clothing choices tip police off to possible criminal behavior.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E18 Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A lawbreaker’s polite and respectful demeanor surprises deputies. Suspicious activity at a gas station leads one officer to trust her gut. An argument over dinner results in a call to the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E18 Momma's Boy
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E04 Settled with a Pipe
programme.desc: A man attacking a woman is tackled by an officer. A vehicle is pulled over for a drug deal in progress. A woman smashes a car window with a pipe in a fit of road rage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E34 Blame my Man
programme.desc: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E19 Runaway
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E13 Shots Fired
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E09 Love Bites
programme.desc: A transgender woman in a wheelchair opens a can of whoop ass on an aggressive bully. Officers find a barely dressed couple in the midst of a biting match. A reckless driver doesn’t take too kindly to being pulled over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E22 Turbo Charged
programme.desc: An extremely understanding cop gives a resistant suspect too many chances. A driver reminds us why we should never let a friend borrow our car. A man with a supped-up vehicle tells an awful lie to police.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E14 Oh Brother
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E16 Doggie Dispute
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog. Officers stop a suspect and find paperwork containing dozens of others Social Security numbers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E10 Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A fleeing suspect takes officers on a wild chase through oncoming traffic. Surveillance footage of a stabbing helps police find the vicious attacker. Cops track a subject into an uncooperative stranger’s apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E13 Naked and Tired
programme.desc: Officers are called when two intoxicated suspects decide to have some fun and vandalize a fence. Undercover officers set up a narcotics sting at a hotel. A man is found lying naked in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E20 A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E15 Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike then tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight about a road rage incident using rocks and a baseball bat. Suspects in a stopped car attempt to hide all the evidence against them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E16 Garden of Crime
programme.desc: Deputies question a woman they believe to be a prostitute working the Las Vegas Strip. A woman tries to pin ownership of drug paraphernalia on an absent friend. A man consents to let officers in his backyard, but he confesses to his own trespasses first.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E08 Grand Theft Auto
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An Officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E23 Traveling Fast
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a convenience store. Dispatch informs officers that a man threatened an elderly woman.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E24 Dead End
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia. A man is arrested in a stolen car containing drugs and a firearm.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E14 We Know Who You Are
programme.desc: Officers are forced to taze a suicidal man for his own good. A familiar face makes cops chase him through a grass field. No lie is too big for a suspect who seeks refuge in a condemned house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E08 You've Gotta Believe Me
programme.desc: A DWI suspect flees from police because he thinks they won’t believe his version of events. A suspect is stopped for jaywalking but when questioned she can’t keep still. A naive man leaves his car unattended for a moment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E32 Anger Management
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E34 Tow Time
programme.desc: Police are in a high-speed chase with a car missing a tire. Police respond when a tow truck driver is assaulted by an apartment manager. Police are called when a relative attacks a woman’s husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E13 I Take This Criminal
programme.desc: During an arrest, a suspect decides to pop the question to his girlfriend. An abandoned house becomes the target of burglary. Two brothers’ dispute over a business matter leads to violence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E05 Hauling Away
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E20 Party in a Box
programme.desc: After a dangerous chase, officers divide and conquer. A suspicious character accuses the cops of being an untrustworthy bunch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E07 Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Officers chase car thieves through town and into the bushes. A friendship crumbles when the cops asks questions. A deputy stops a man who insists that he lets homeless people use his car for storage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E21 Hands Off The Junk
programme.desc: A passenger bails from a fleeing stolen vehicle then claims that he was only getting a ride. An undercover officer pulls a sting on a handsy prostitute. An anxious lady gets nabbed for weed after calling the police on her quarrelsome husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E18 An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck is stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.desc: Poznaj Jonny'ego Toolboxa i AnimaCars i dołącz do ich licznych misji ratunkowych, aby przywrócić spokój w Animatown!

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: An essential piece of rock history. Since 1969, Wishbone Ash has taken their legendary twin-guitar sound across the globe. Witness this milestone 30th-anniversary performance captured live in London.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fast and Flavourful Dinners for Monday to Thursday
programme.desc: Home cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco uses her multi-cooker to whip up four comforting weeknight meals that are fast and easy.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Weeknight Dishes made in Little Thyme
programme.desc: Who has "thyme" to make dinner after a hectic day? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco inspires with four recipes including a Mushroom Thyme Risotto.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Mother's Day
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day in the Holiday Eatz kitchen, and happy host Kimberly Lallouz has a magnificent menu any mother will love"... The recipes are made for mom, but designed for dad (and the kids) to prepare"... First step? Breakfast in bed"... featuring decadent and savoury cream cheese pancakes topped with smoked salmon and capers. Next up is an easy asparagus salad with tahini and mint then a simple pasta dressed up with pre-cooked lobster and fresh peas. For dessert? Mom will scream when she finds out this no-fuss almond strawberry shortcake is low-carb so she can have a guilt-free second slice!

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Hearty Weeknight Multi-Cooker Dishes
programme.desc: Do you know the secret to an uncracked cheesecake? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco shares her trick to making a perfectly silky-smooth Salted Caramel Cheesecake.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Classic Sunday Dishes Made in Weeknight Time
programme.desc: Charming cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four multi-cooker dishes that save on time but are bursting with flavour.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Four Fresh Dinners that are Always on Time
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four dinners in minutes using her multi-cooker including a delicious Lasagna and mouth-watering Burrito Bowl with Chermoula.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Healthy Start
programme.desc: Brunch is the most important meal of the weekend! Join host Vanessa Gianfrancesco as she whips up healthy and delicious recipes that'll awaken your taste buds.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Pancake Brunch
programme.desc: Pancakes are a classic brunch staple, but host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up her twist on this traditional dish with savoury, sweet and crunchy recipes.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Champagne Brunch
programme.desc: Champagne, lobster, and homemade scones, oh my! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up an indulgent and luxurious brunch that's perfect for those fabulous mid-mornings.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Pick Up Your Brunch
programme.desc: Skip the utensils and gather for chef Vanessa's pick up your brunch! Featuring Sticky Pull-Apart Praline Bread and an extra cheesy Monte Cristo Sandwich.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Up All Night Brunch
programme.desc: Have you been up all night? There's a brunch for that! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four decadent recipes including an indulgent Breakfast Poutine and chocolate Stuffed French Toast.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 French Brunch
programme.desc: Inspired by flaky, buttery, and chocolatey dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Farmhouse Brunch
programme.desc: Charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four classic wholesome and hearty dishes for her Farmhouse Brunch.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Southern Brunch
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco brings the heat to her brunch table with southern-style recipes including a Huevos Divorciados and Fried Chicken and Waffles.

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Summer Lovin’
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania plan a summer-themed menu with a table to match! There’s cherry tomato pasta, grilled steak salad, chilled lobster wraps, and so much more!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Tapas Night
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a Spanish tapas-themed menu with a table to match! There’s lamb meatballs, battered cod with peppers, garlic shrimp, fried eggplant with honey, and so much more!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Brunch for a Bunch
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a brunch menu with a table to match! There's a blueberry smoothie bowl, potato rosti, shakshuka, stuffed French toast and so much more!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Rustico Italiano
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania plan a rustic Italian menu with a table to match! There’s nonna’s salad, Sunday sauce, rapini with garlic and chili, Sicilian sea bass, and so much more!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Taco Night
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a taco night menu with a table to match! There's chicken taquitos, pulled pork tacos, pico di gallo, guacamole, homemade taco sauce, and so much more!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Spring Fling
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a springtime menu with a table to match! There's fava beans and asparagus salad, lamb shoulder with artichokes and mint, sumac-lime green beans, deviled eggs, and so much more!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania plan an afternoon tea with a table to match! There’s tea sandwiches, scones with jam and clotted cream, mini quiche, Steffy’s banana cake, and so much more!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Italiano
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Italian-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: parm crusted chicken cutlets, roasted fennel, and broken cannoli!

The recipes are made for mom, but designed for dad (and the kids) to prepare"... First step? Breakfast in bed"... featuring decadent and savoury cream cheese pancakes topped with smoked salmon and capers. Next up is an easy asparagus salad with tahini and mint then a simple pasta dressed up with pre-cooked lobster and fresh peas. For dessert? Mom will scream when she finds out this no-fuss almond strawberry shortcake is low-carb so she can have a guilt-free second slice!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Dim Yum!
programme.desc: Warm and talented Cantonese home cook Mary Tang kick starts this One World Kitchen 3 episode by show- casing traditional, evERS-popular dim-sum dishes. First up, juicy Pork-Filled Dumplings! Made with fresh watERS-chest- nuts, shiitake mushrooms and a blend of Asian sauces and spices, these sweet and salty bite-sized creations are to die for! To add to our desire, Mary fries up some savoury Chinese Daikon Radish Cakes in a piping hot wok. Next, a flavourful lotus leaf filled with sticky rice and a medley of salted duck eggs, Shaoxing wine, and dried shrimp is truly hard to resist! To finish off, Mary combines gorgeous Adzuki beans with rice flour and sesame seeds to create airy and full...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Vietnamese food with a French Twist
programme.desc: Lisa Nguyen, a passionate and fun-loving Vietnamese home cook, introduces us to some of her favourite Vietnamese dishes with a French flare. Set in the colourful One World Kitchen 3 kitchen, Lisa assembles a classic Vietnamese sandwich. Golden-brown sautéed onions, salty bacon, tangy pickled carrots and daikon, and flavourful ground pork p'té pressed between two slices of crispy baguette will definitely get your mouth salivating. Next up, hot pork lathered in cognac inside a crunchy golden puff pastry. Moving away from pork, Lisa then cooks up a hearty plate of Shaking Beef with a leafy watercress salad on the side. Finally, Lisa shows us her Vietnamese play on a traditional French...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Lebanese Culinary Favourites
programme.desc: What better way to start a meal than with dessert? Lebanese home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us how to make a gooey cheese pastry doused in sweet syrup called Knafeh. With a buttery golden-brown crust, oozy melted cheese and fragrant rose water, this decadent dessert will surely satisfy your sweet tooth. Next on the menu, a Lebanese classic - pita bread. You'll never buy it from the store again with this delightfully easy recipe! Jasmin then prepares a well-known Lebanese sandwich - you guessed it, Shawarma! Loaded with charred chicken, a popular Lebanese 7 spice mix, and yummy garlic sauce, this might be the best sandwich ever! Finally, Jasmin cooks up a batch of tasty Beirut Spicy Fish -...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E22 Popular Athens Recipes
programme.desc: Greek home cook Joanna Chery kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen by showcasing popular recipes from Athens. She begins by preparing Chicken Souvlaki with Tzatziki, a classic dish featuring succulent, beautifully charred chicken skewers and a refreshing cucumber yogurt garlic dipping sauce. Next, she fries up some deliciously flaky cod with an irresitble garlic-potato dip, a staple recipe for Greece's Independence Day. Another popular dish in the Greek culture is Lamb Fricassee. It includes crispy, browned lamb pieces, juicy beef stock and a lovely egg - so savoury! Don't forget, we need a perfect dessert to follow a rich and hearty lamb dish: fried dough balls. Joanna shows us her...

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seeds, Bark + Flower Parts
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Saturday Morning Breakfast
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to make delightful breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Coq au Vin
programme.desc: Up the Dish goes French cuisine with Poppy Sandler's classic Coq au Vin! Slow-cooked chicken in a luscious red wine sauce with pearl onions and mushrooms on the side? Yes please! Tiera Singh sticks with the tricolour theme and makes a Salad Lyonnaise - crispy bacon, poached eggs, and homemade croutons, with a red wine-bacon vinaigrette that steals the show. Missy Hui stays on the continent but skips la Republique; her Vincotto Mushrooms with Lentils uses an Italian wine to sauce up meaty oyster mushrooms and aromatic vegetables for a vegetarian twist. But Micah Trainor takes us right back to France - her Rabbit Rillettes with Champagne Gelee is white tablecloth worthy, with rabbit confit...

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Upside Down
programme.desc: Last things are first for this 'Upside Down' themed One Big Recipe featuring Montreal chef Kimberly Lallouz. Fruit and cheese to start? Why not? Check out her dessert wine poached Grilled Pears and Blue Cheese Salad. Next, Beef Tartare Sliders are spiked with horseradish aioli and served on warm brioche. Pasta follows, but in keeping with her topsy turvy theme, Korean flavour meets Italian savour in her Kimchi Pappardelle. Fish is next, Loup de Mer en Papillote with Ã‰crasé Potatoes is dressed up with shaved fennel and rich beurre rouge sauce. How do you end an inside-outside- upside-downside dinner? With the perfect starter! Check out Kim's Oyster Shooters with Champagne Granité for a...

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seeds, Bark + Flower Parts
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.title: Sin Miedo a Nada
programme.desc: Estás invitado a vivir sin fronteras, derribar obstáculos y experimentar el poder transformador, sanador y guía de la Palabra.

programme.title: Fe y Fuego
programme.desc: Fe y Fuego con el Rev. Samuel Rodríguez, es un programa que te trae la selección más inspiradora de conferencias de todo Estados Unidos y el mundo hispano.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: New Yorker Ursula and accountant Jimmy from Ennis enlist Dermot's help with their colossal house in Firhouse, Dublin

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Clare Heenan and Rory Kelly live in a compact 1950's bungalow in the south Dublin suburb of Stillorgan. Long time renters, the couple struggled for years to afford this house. It's their first home but with a series of small, disjointed rooms and a damp, grotty extension - it's far from ideal...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the ten years since they first met Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin have been dreaming of owning their own home. Now they've bought a property in Dun Laoghaire south county Dublin but it's as far from being a home, or even a house, as you could imagine.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe have bought themselves what they hope will be an ideal family home in a unique location - a listed 19th century former schoolhouse at Kilternan with spectacular views of the Dublin mountains, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Struggling with a tight schedule, a limited budget and the traditionalist taste of his clients, can Dermot balance their love of classic farmhouse design with his own vision of clean urban functionality?

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot wants to create a wheelchair friendly house in Malahide that's also a welcoming family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sally-Ann, her husband Trevor, and their four children live in Sally-Ann's childhood home - a huge, distinctive 1970s architect-designed home outside Mullingar in Westmeath that they've dreamed of rennovating for years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Since they married two years ago, Paul and Sabina Horgan have become the proud parents of baby Mia and the owners of a property on the North Dublin coast: Lismara - a dilapidated 1940s cottage in Portmarnock in an extremely poor condition.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: GP, writer and budding musician Dr Pat Harrold, his wife Marita, a physiotherapist, and their four kids returned to Pat's home town of Nenagh 10 years ago and they have been looking for a place to call home ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Leonard and Caroline live in house once owned by Leonard's grandparents in the south Dublin suburb of Dundrum - a 1960s three-bed semi that hasn't changed at all since the couple bought it two years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E04 Room to Improve

programme.title: Room to Improve

programme.desc: Claudia and Tom bought this 1920s bungalow with panoramic views of Tramore Bay in 2012 for 305K. Just back from living abroad (Spain, Dubai and Germany) they have been living in the house for the past year.

programme.title: Room to Improve

They live in an Edwardian terraced three story house. The terrace was originally built for officers of the British Army, between 1897 and 1902. Glenn is a youth worker for LGBTI+ young people in the city centre and Gustav is a banker.

programme.desc: Alex starts in Niagara with a 5 course meal along with enjoying dance performances near the Niagara falls. He then interacts with a wine expert to learn more about the regional wines. Lastly, Alex is seen exploring the Niagara falls by helicopter, the a tunnel that takes him to the observation desk and then by ferry.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Food Fact Fun Vancouver Island, Canada
programme.desc: Alex is in Vancouver Island and calls for Saffron salmon at Modern Cafe. Next he visits “Red fish blue fish” a fish and chip shop and tries freshly prepared seafood. Further explores the Parksville beach for its sand sculptures and then explores a 50 year old Symphony Winery. Further Alex visits “Eagle wing whale watching” for fun and knowledge about the ocean life. To add to the adventure rush he tries motocross and then snorkels in cold waters of Nanaimo.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Food Fact Fun Whistler, Canada
programme.desc: Alex starts with Kangaroo meat pie in Whistler with a Australian ginger beer and continuing his food trail he visits Earls kitchen for a tuna dish. He then tries out e-biking and travels in the world’s highest cable car joining Blackcomb with Whistler mountain. Next, he visits Squamish lil’wat cultural center to learn about the Aboriginal people. Finally, he takes a tour of Pemberton valley on a horse, tries Canada’s highest zipline and bungee jumps over the Cheakamus river.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Food Fact Fun Vancouver Island, Canada
programme.desc: Alex is in Vancouver Island and calls for Saffron salmon at Modern Cafe. Next he visits “Red fish blue fish” a fish and chip shop and tries freshly prepared seafood. Further explores the Parksville beach for its sand sculptures and then explores a 50 year old Symphony Winery. Further Alex visits “Eagle wing whale watching” for fun and knowledge about the ocean life. To add to the adventure rush he tries motocross and then snorkels in cold waters of Nanaimo.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Season Review - Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge: 27min-HL
programme.desc: The 2025 World Downhill Skateboarding Championships season review recaps the global series held across locations including USA, UK, and Turkey. The season blends high-adrenaline competition with grassroots engagement, promoting downhill skateboarding worldwide

programme.title: IWSA Formula Wing World Championships - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The Formula Wing World Championships 2025 are among the most prestigious competitions in the rapidly growing sport of wingfoiling. Athletes from around the globe will gather to race across the water at top speeds, showcasing both technical mastery and tactical skill.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 3 & 4
programme.desc: In todays Episode we´re traveling to France & Belgium for round 3 & 4 of the World E-Bike Series. The World’s best male & female mountain bikers are going to battle out who will take the lead in the middle of the racing calendar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 5 & 6
programme.desc: A long and exciting World E-Bike Series season enters its final two rounds in Girona and Barcelona. Who will be crowned the winner of the series this year? Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2023 #03: NEOM Titan Desert Dash Saudi Arabia - Neom (KSA)
programme.desc: NEOM Titan Desert Saudi-Arabien ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer mit ständigen sportlichen Herausforderungen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2023 #05: Nedbank Desert Dash 2022 - Namibia (NAM)
programme.desc: The Desert Dash is more than an endurance mountain bike race, it's a wild beast that lures you and challenges you. It is a 393 km long, 24 hour battle between man and nature, body and spirit.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Trans Hong Kong - A Urban MTB Adventure (HKG)
programme.desc: The urban mountain bike adventure series combines rides in some of the world's largest cities. In this episode we cycle through the Hong Kong region with none other than Hans “no way” Rey, the grandfather of mountain bike freeriding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 2 - USA
programme.desc: The Swiss mountaineering company Mammut is celebrating its 150th anniversary with the largest summit project in history: 150 summit ascents are being organized worldwide as part of the “150 Peaks Project”.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Kayaking Kerala - Part 1
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a wide variety of powerful rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Kayaking Kerala - Part 2
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a variety of rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Coldwater Classic Series 2010 - Documentary
programme.desc: The Cold Water Classic events feature $15,000 for the winner of each event and $50,000 for the series winner. The Cold Water Classic is the first series of its kind and takes place in some of the world's rougher surf spots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 VANORA Engadinwind by DAKINE - Racing
programme.desc: For almost two weeks, Lake Silvaplana in the beautiful Engadine will be the meeting point for the international windsurfing elite. With more than 300 participants from over 30 countries worldwide, the Engandinwind is the largest windsurf foil event of all time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 VANORA Engadinwind by DAKINE - Foiling
programme.desc: For almost two weeks, Lake Silvaplana in the beautiful Engadin will be the meeting point for the international windsurfing elite. With more than 300 participants from over 30 countries worldwide, the Engandinwind is the largest windsurf foil event of all time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 WOF 2023 #09: Mediterranean Epic 2023
programme.desc: Die 4. Edition des Mediterranean Epic ist der Auftakt der Mountainbike-Etappenrennen. Es ist ein 4-tägiges Rennen (UCI Hors Catégorie), das in Castellón, Oropesa del Mar (Spanien), stattfindet.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2023 #23: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Morocco
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge entdecken wir die ungezähmte Landschaft und die wunderschöne Wüste von Marokko. Wir machen einen 6-tägigen Mountainbike-Trip durch die spektakulären Sanddünen und werden beim diesjährigen Titan Desert 2023 epische Bike-Action erleben.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2023 #42: WES E-Bike World Series #5 & World Rookie Tour Finals
programme.desc: In der heutigen Episode machen wir einen Städtetrip: Zuerst schauen wir bei der WES E-Bike World Series in Bielstein, Deutschland, vorbei und dann geht's weiter zum Finale der World Rookie Tour und ihren jungen Skatetalente in Innbruck.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2023 #45: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Almería (ESP)
programme.desc: Der Škoda Titan Desert Almería ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer, mit ständigen sportlichen und persönlichen Herausforderungen. Ein einzigartiges Erlebnis, bei dem man seine Grenzen auf dem Bike messen und Erfahrungen mit dem Rest des Titan Camps teilen kann.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Mystic Sk8te Cup 2018 - Prague (CZE)
programme.desc: Welcome to the Mystic Sk8 Cup 2018! This year Prague welcomed 174 skateboarders, including 33 girls, from 29 countries to this three-day competition in Street, Bowl and Best Trick. Over 15,000 fans came to cheer on the best riders from around the world

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 WOF 2023 #40: BetCity Royal Championships Queen & King of the Court 2023
programme.desc: Dieses Turnier ist größer als je zuvor, die besten Spieler der Welt kommen vom 5. bis 10. September nach 'Manhattan an der Maas'. Ein 'königliches' Stadion direkt im Stadtzentrum am Henegouwerplein ist der Schauplatz und Nebenplätze in den Vororten umrahmen dieses Ereignis.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Nyami Nyami - Slacklining at the Victoria Falls
programme.desc: Two renowned highlining athletes, Reinhard Kleindl (AUT) and Lukas Irmler (GER), realized one of the longest highlines in Africa and the southern hemisphere at the world-famous Victoria Falls!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Outdoorsportsteam Paragliding - The Dream of Flight
programme.desc: We take you into the sky and accompany a paragliding virtuoso to the Mont Blanc massif, the Atacama Desert in Chile and the Greek island of Santorini. Follow French paraglider pilot Jean-Baptiste Chandelier.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Dani Arnold - Ice Climbing at Lake Baikal
programme.desc: Swiss extreme sportsman Dani Arnold went on a challenging expedition to the deepest lake on earth - Lake Baikal. The Siberian winter provided accordingly difficult and fascinating conditions.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 X-Project 2.0
programme.desc: X-project 2.0 is a worldwide unique project where different winter sports unite in front of the backdrop of a Swiss dreamscape in the mountains of Engadin valley (Canton of Grisons).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Epic Series 2026. In this first episode we will dive deep into the heads of the worlds thoughest Mountainbikers who have and will again battle it out in the Cape Epic stagerace. The Absa Cape Epic is a physically gruelling and mentally demanding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 WOF 2026 #12: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup - Cape Verde 2026
programme.desc: The GKA World Tour is back with a brand new season, packed with top-class Kite-sports. We are opening with a banger, a well known wave-spot and classic of the tour. Once again Cape Verde's iconic Ponta Preta break hosts the GKA's Kite-Surf season opener.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _16_ Epic Series - ABSA Cape Epic Part 1
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: IWSA Formula Wing World Championships - Live delayed Part 2
programme.desc: The Formula Wing World Championships 2025 are among the most prestigious competitions in the rapidly growing sport of wingfoiling. Athletes from around the globe will gather to race across the water at top speeds, showcasing both technical mastery and tactical skill.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Slay the Bay
programme.desc: ‘Slay The Bay’ is a urban mountain bike adventure in the San Francisco Bay area. . Hans Rey, an icon in the bike scene, on this trip accompanied by fellow Freeride pioneer Brett Tippie.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2024 #03: Greenlandic
programme.desc: In today´s episode we have the ultimate journey into the heart of Greenland´s rich culture and untamed backcountry. Join us as we explore the breathtaking landcapes of this Artic wonderland. It´s the paradise for every passionate freeskier. Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2024 #05: Reconnect One - USA
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2024 #10: Reconnect Two - USA
programme.desc: Today we continue our North American Odyssey with Sarka Pancochova and Cheryl Maas in Reconnect Two. From Mt Baker and the legendary Bank Slalom to backcountry kickers in Bend get ready for the full Pacific Northwest snowboard experience.

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #3 - Kicking Horse Golden BC Pro (CAN)
programme.desc: It was the 3rd stop of the Freeride World Tour 2023 in Canada at Kicking Horse Golden BC Pro, (CAN). After two stops in the Pyrenees the world’s best riders came over the Atlantic to hit the powder in the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 WOF 2023 #16: Freeride World Tour 2023 - Season Recap
programme.desc: Die Freeride World Tour 2023 hat ihr großes Finale in Xtreme Verbier, Schweiz - wie immer mit den besten Freeridern aus der ganzen Welt!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 Winter Games 2018 - JWC Big Air Ski & SNB (NZL) - Highlights
programme.desc: The world's best talent and Kiwi hospitality will be showcased to a global audience at Winter Games New Zealand. The stars compete for fame in various sports such as freestyle skiing, snowboarding and cross-country skiing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2025 #42: IWSA WingFoil Racing World Cup - Türkiye & China
programme.desc: Across two continents, in Türkiye and China, the IWSA WingFoil Racing World Cup brings together the fastest and most skilled athletes on the water. From high-speed sprints to tight tactical maneuvers, every race tests precision, strategy, and courage.

programme.title: FWT Challenger 2025 X Over Ride Kitzsteinhorn Challenger – Zell am See-Kaprun - Live delayed Part 3
programme.desc: The FWT Challenger 2025 X Over Ride Kitzsteinhorn took place from March 15 to 18, 2025 in Zell am See-Kaprun. At this event as part of the Freeride World Tour qualification series, top freeriders competed against each other on the slopes of the Kitzsteinhorn

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 – Ibiraquera (BRA) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, which brings together the best kitesurfers in the world. Athletes from all over the world will compete for the title and show impressive skills in surfing and strapless freestyle.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Coldwater Classic Series 2010 - Documentary
programme.desc: The Cold Water Classic events feature $15,000 for the winner of each event and $50,000 for the series winner. The Cold Water Classic is the first series of its kind and takes place in some of the world's rougher surf spots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 VANORA Engadinwind by DAKINE - Racing
programme.desc: For almost two weeks, Lake Silvaplana in the beautiful Engadine will be the meeting point for the international windsurfing elite. With more than 300 participants from over 30 countries worldwide, the Engandinwind is the largest windsurf foil event of all time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 VANORA Engadinwind by DAKINE - Foiling
programme.desc: For almost two weeks, Lake Silvaplana in the beautiful Engadin will be the meeting point for the international windsurfing elite. With more than 300 participants from over 30 countries worldwide, the Engandinwind is the largest windsurf foil event of all time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Epic Series 2026. In this first episode we will dive deep into the heads of the worlds thoughest Mountainbikers who have and will again battle it out in the Cape Epic stagerace. The Absa Cape Epic is a physically gruelling and mentally demanding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 WOF 2026 #12: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup - Cape Verde 2026
programme.desc: The GKA World Tour is back with a brand new season, packed with top-class Kite-sports. We are opening with a banger, a well known wave-spot and classic of the tour. Once again Cape Verde's iconic Ponta Preta break hosts the GKA's Kite-Surf season opener.

programme.title: IWSA Formula Wing World Championships - Live delayed Part 2
programme.desc: The Formula Wing World Championships 2025 are among the most prestigious competitions in the rapidly growing sport of wingfoiling. Athletes from around the globe will gather to race across the water at top speeds, showcasing both technical mastery and tactical skill.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 WOF 2023 #09: Mediterranean Epic 2023
programme.desc: Die 4. Edition des Mediterranean Epic ist der Auftakt der Mountainbike-Etappenrennen. Es ist ein 4-tägiges Rennen (UCI Hors Catégorie), das in Castellón, Oropesa del Mar (Spanien), stattfindet.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2023 #23: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Morocco
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge entdecken wir die ungezähmte Landschaft und die wunderschöne Wüste von Marokko. Wir machen einen 6-tägigen Mountainbike-Trip durch die spektakulären Sanddünen und werden beim diesjährigen Titan Desert 2023 epische Bike-Action erleben.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2023 #42: WES E-Bike World Series #5 & World Rookie Tour Finals
programme.desc: In der heutigen Episode machen wir einen Städtetrip: Zuerst schauen wir bei der WES E-Bike World Series in Bielstein, Deutschland, vorbei und dann geht's weiter zum Finale der World Rookie Tour und ihren jungen Skatetalente in Innbruck.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2023 #45: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Almería (ESP)
programme.desc: Der Škoda Titan Desert Almería ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer, mit ständigen sportlichen und persönlichen Herausforderungen. Ein einzigartiges Erlebnis, bei dem man seine Grenzen auf dem Bike messen und Erfahrungen mit dem Rest des Titan Camps teilen kann.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Nyami Nyami - Slacklining at the Victoria Falls
programme.desc: Two renowned highlining athletes, Reinhard Kleindl (AUT) and Lukas Irmler (GER), realized one of the longest highlines in Africa and the southern hemisphere at the world-famous Victoria Falls!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Outdoorsportsteam Paragliding - The Dream of Flight
programme.desc: We take you into the sky and accompany a paragliding virtuoso to the Mont Blanc massif, the Atacama Desert in Chile and the Greek island of Santorini. Follow French paraglider pilot Jean-Baptiste Chandelier.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Dani Arnold - Ice Climbing at Lake Baikal
programme.desc: Swiss extreme sportsman Dani Arnold went on a challenging expedition to the deepest lake on earth - Lake Baikal. The Siberian winter provided accordingly difficult and fascinating conditions.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 X-Project 2.0
programme.desc: X-project 2.0 is a worldwide unique project where different winter sports unite in front of the backdrop of a Swiss dreamscape in the mountains of Engadin valley (Canton of Grisons).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Gorges de l'Ardèche
programme.desc: France is home to several geological and aquatic wonders. In autumn, the river and its gorges are the perfect setting for a competition celebrating white-water paddling. It’s the 37th edition of the International Marathon!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 European Freestyle Pro Tour 2022
programme.desc: Neusiedl am See, (AUT), April 27th to May 1st, 2022With 9 events on the calendar across Europe and South America, it is getting excited for Europe’s and America’s best freestyle windsurfing action!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 GKA Worldcup & GWA Worldcup
programme.desc: Today we’re shooting the breeze with both KiteSurfers and wing foilers. We start in Columbia with the kiting and then head to Leucate in France for the foiling.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 WOF 2023 #49: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Neom (KSA)
programme.desc: Die NEOM Titan Desert Saudi-Arabien macht ihrem mächtigen Namen alle Ehre. Bei diesem Ausdauer- und Orientierungsrennen für Mountainbiker, das durch die bergige Wüste von NEOM führt, müssen die Fahrer in vier intensiven Etappen um den Sieg kämpfen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 WOF 2024 #11: Mediterranean Epic 2024
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Epic offers an UCI 4 stage race where mountain bikers enjoy mountain biking to the fullest during the route around Oropesa del Mar - Castellón (Spain).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 WOF 2024 #15: Absa Cape Epic 2024 - Best of WOMEN
programme.desc: The ABSA Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 648 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 15 475m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 WOF 2025 #12: Mediterranean Epic by Scott 2025
programme.desc: February 6-9, 2025, Oropesa del Mar (ESP): The Mediterranean Epic is a UCI 4-stage race where mountain bikers can enjoy mountain biking to the fullest on the course around Oropesa del Mar in the province of Castellón in Spain.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 WOF 2024 #30: DATEV Challenge Roth 2024
programme.desc: World’s biggest long-distance triathlon: DATEV Challenge Roth 2024July 7th, 2024The world’s best athletes will conquer the traditional triathlon distance of 3.8 km swimming, 180 km cycling and 42.2 km running through the district of Roth in Bavaria, Germany.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 WOF 2025 #25: Golden Roof Challenge - Innsbruck (AUT)
programme.desc: On June 7, the Golden Roof Challenge celebrated its 21st edition in the heart of Innsbruck, Austria. Twenty top international pole vault and long jump athletes compete for crucial world ranking points on “The FlySwat”

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 WOF 2024 #18: If it’s easy it’s not fun
programme.desc: Join us on a beatiful adventures through the sky and desert of Jordan, where three french friends seek for adrenalin and creacks in the sandstone of Wadirum (JOR).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2024 #19: Pasko the Magic Move
programme.desc: Recovering from testicular cancer, professional athlete and filmmaker Maarten Molenaar embarks on a journey to Fuerteventura to learn a new freestyle windsurfing trick - the Pasko.

programme.title: LINE OF SIGHT | A Look into Wingsuit BASE Jumping
programme.desc: The golden age of wingsuiting is upon us. Through evolving suit technology the initial inflation time has gone down, which has lead to quicker starts and more exits. Wingsuit athletes Marshal Miller, Jesse Hall, and Sean Chuma take you through the iconic jumps.

programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Abu Dhabi will host the GKA Kite World Tour for the first time, bringing back-to-back World Cups in Hydrofoil Big Air and Freestyle to Fahid Island, Abu Dhabi’s newest coastal wellness destination and the world’s first Fitwel-certified island, offering 11kms of coastline. From 25 to 30 October, the world’s top kiteboarders will take to Fahid Island’s pristine waters in a six-day spectacle of high-flying action, part of the Fahid Island Watersports Festival – a nine-day celebration that will also feature the season finale of the GWA Wingfoil World Tour and the championship deciders of the SFT Surf Foil World Tour. In Hydrofoil Big Air, the battle for the world title is a close-run thing....

programme.title: GKA Kite World Cup Sylt 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Reigning Kite-Surf world champions, France’s Capucine Delannoy and Brazil’s Gabriel Benetton, will be the top seeds as they continue the defence of their crowns at the discipline’s second tour stop in Sylt, Germany.

programme.title: Open Faces 2025 - YETI Freeride Junior World Championships Kappl/Paznaun - LIVE Part 1
programme.desc: Open Faces 2025 - YETI Freeride Junior World Championships Kappl/Paznaun - LIVE Part 1

programme.title: Golden Fly Series Genf (SUI) 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: Geneva will host the Golden Fly Series 2024 athletics spectacle for the first time! On Saturday 21 Sep, the world's best long jumpers and pole vaulters will be competing for important world ranking points on the largest mobile World Athletics-certified athletics facility in the world.

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #4 - Fieberbrunn Pro (AUT)
programme.desc: The Freeride World Tour 2023 has its fourth stop in Fieberbrunn, Austria - as always with the best freeriders from all over the world! The first part of the FWT finals takes place in Fieberbrunn, where the athletes have to conquer the imposing Wildseeloder.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 WOF 2024 #01: Winter Games New Zealand - Park Jam Team Challenge
programme.desc: Building on the success of the Big Air, get ready for the next thrilling New Zealand Winter Games episode, The Park Jam Team Challenge! Witness the fusion of skill and creativity as Freestyle Skiers and Snowboarders showcase their prowess in this high-energy competition.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 Winter Games 2017 - Freeride Ski & Snowboard - New Zealand
programme.desc: Stunning scenery, world’s best talent and Kiwi hospitality is set to be showcased to a global audience with Winter Games New Zealand revealing its most diverse event yet. Winter Olympic, Paralympic and X Games stars are heading to New Zealand once again.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 EFPT Stop #02 Vieste

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2025 #19: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 1
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 WOF 2025 #20: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 2
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 WOF 2025 #27: Epic Series - 4 Islands
programme.desc: The 4Islands Epic is a legendary stage race as part of the Epic Series, which takes place on the Croatian islands of the Kvarner region - Lošinj, Cres, Krk and occasionally Rab - and offers around 260 km and 5,600 vertical meters over five days (prologue + four stages).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2025 #32: Epic Series - Andorra Epic
programme.desc: The Andorra Epic took place from July 15 to 18, 2025, in the breathtaking Pyrenees. Over four days, riders covered 160 km and 5,000 meters of elevation gain. The event offered world-class mountain biking in the unique atmosphere of Andorra's alpine villages.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 adidas ROCKSTARS 2018
programme.desc: Impressive, gravity-defying moves on vertical walls are guaranteed as the world's best bouldering athletes compete for a place in the super finals at the annual adidas ROCKSTARS Invitational, taking place in Germany on September 21st and 22nd.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 WOF 2025 #33: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships - Erzincan (TUR)
programme.desc: The second round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championship took place under sunny skies high up on Mount Ergan Dağı in Erzincan, Turkey. This was the third visit to the 3 km long track, often referred to as the most difficult in the world.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: Cerro Torre Fly & Climb
programme.desc: The West Face route with its long glacier approach through the Circo de los Altares certainly feels ‘out there’. That the whole team were able to take off from the summit with their paragliders is a testament to their skill, both as climbers and as pilots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2025 #04: Maneuvre Vancouvre - with Hans Rey
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cape Epic 2026 - Prologue
programme.desc: The 2026 Absa Cape Epic, pinnacle of the Epic Series, tears across 700 kilometres of raw South African wilderness, with 16 000 meters of climbing that will humble the unprepared and honour the relentless. Teams of two have to compete and cross the finish line together.

programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
